title: Clean Evaluation.py CodeQL findings (start with unused imports)

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Removed validated unused imports from plexus/Evaluation.py only. Fresh rcql --files Evaluation.py dropped findings from 50 to 18 (unused-import warnings cleared). Targeted tests passed: tests/cli/test_evaluation_item_lookup.py and tests/cli/test_evaluation_scoreversion_association.py (24 passed).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Follow-up cleanup in Evaluation.py: fixed py/catch-base-exception by replacing bare except in trace parsing with specific decode exceptions, and fixed py/empty-except by explicit debug logging in cleanup wait timeout/cancel path. Fresh rcql --files Evaluation.py now shows 3 findings, all py/mixed-returns. Targeted evaluation tests pass (24 passed).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Evaluation.py CodeQL findings resolved in commit d5c3cfb2b.
